title: Executable Written to Remote Admin Share (Lateral Tool Transfer)
description: Detects staging of a payload to a remote administrative share (ADMIN$, C$, IPC$) prior to service- or task-based execution. Impacket smbexec/psexec and manual 'copy \\host\C$' transfers leave this artifact during lateral movement across the GOAD estate.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*copy *' or 'Command Line' like '*xcopy*' or 'Command Line' like '*robocopy*' or 'Command Line' like '*Copy-Item*' or 'Command Line' like '*move *')) and (('Command Line' like '*ADMIN$*' or 'Command Line' like '*C$*' or 'Command Line' like '*IPC$*')) and (('Command Line' like '*.exe*' or 'Command Line' like '*.dll*' or 'Command Line' like '*.bat*' or 'Command Line' like '*.ps1*')))
falsepositives: Administrative software distribution over admin shares
